reviews.comment:
larga fila en el shop para pedir comida
atención buena.. mejorable

me tomó la mitad del pedido

se entiende la dificultad de atender cada pedido habiendo tanta gente

(Translated by Google)
Long line at the store to order food
Good service... could be improved

It took me half the order

It's understandable how difficult it is to serve each order with so many people
